training: Direct SNN training from scratch (BPTT, surrogate gradient, 50 epochs)
description: SEW-ResNet trained directly as an SNN from scratch (no ANN→SNN conversion). 67.7% at T=8 timesteps. Demonstrates direct SNN training with surrogate gradients. Accuracy improves with more timesteps and training epochs.
note: Single seed, 50 epochs. Extended training (200+ epochs) expected to reach 85%+.
